content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

November 5, 2002

J. Dennis Crabb
Rollston, Henderson, Rasmussen & Crabb
591 Tahoe Keys Boulevard, Suite D8
South Lake Tahoe, CA 96150

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-02-291

Dear Mr. Crabb:

We are in receipt of your request for advice on behalf of Mayor Keith M. Sweet regarding the conflict of interest provisions of the Political Reform Act.¹ As this question relates to the past conduct of Mayor Sweet, we are unable to provide you with a written response (See § 83114; subd. (b); regulation 18329, subd. (b)(8)(A)&(C), copy enclosed).

If you have any other questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

[Signature]
By: Holly B. Armstrong
Staff Counsel, Legal Division

HBA:jg
I:\AdviceLtrs\W-02-291

¹ Government Code sections 81000-91014. Commission regulations appear at Title 2, sections 18109-18997, of the California Code of Regulations.
